arts.ttl: Newcastle star labels Carabao Cup Final win as 'the best day of my life'
arts.sum: Bruno Guimaraes promised Newcastle fans when he signed and they were threatened by relegation that he would do everything he could to lead them to a trophy - on Sunday he delivered

arts.ttl: Mo Salah moment sums up Liverpool's struggles in Carabao Cup Final defeat
arts.sum: LIVERPOOL 1-2 NEWCASTLE UNITED: Liverpool are still well on track to end the season as Premier League champions but the Reds fell well short against Newcastle at Wembley

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe is a force of nature who deserves all the plaudits after ending Newcastle's 70-year wait for a domestic trophy - from this silverware will come a bronzed likeness of him, writes CRAIG HOPE
arts.sum: CRAIG HOPE AT WEMBLEY: Standing still is not his thing. It is because of that drive, that hourly desire to improve those under his care, that Newcastle United are trophyless no more.

arts.ttl: This was a no-show, a failure from Liverpool who slipped through the Carabao Cup final like ghosts - Arne Slot was outcoached and his team were outplayed, writes IAN LADYMAN
arts.sum: IAN LADYMAN AT WEMBLEY: This was a calamitous effort from the Premier League leaders. Everybody loses in sport at one time or another. But to lose like this is quite something else.

arts.ttl: There is no hiding that this Carabao Cup defeat was the worst display from a Liverpool side in a final for a long time - Arne Slot will take many lessons from his most bruising week at the club, writes LEWIS STEELE
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE AT WEMBLEY: The Arne Slot machine malfunctioned at the worst time possible, following up their European exit with a Carabao Cup final defeat.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville fumes at VAR after late call in Newcastle's Carabao Cup Final triumph
arts.sum: Newcastle United beat Liverpool to win the Carabao Cup final at Wembley but the Magpies' 2-1 victory wasn't without its VAR drama - to the frustration of Gary Neville

arts.ttl: 'Never seen in my life' - Arne Slot explains Dan Burn plan after dramatic Liverpool mismatch
arts.sum: Arne Slot explains tactical decision that helped Dan Burn head in the opening goal as Liverpool lose the Carabao Cup final to Newcastle

arts.ttl: Liverpool: Shock new statistic revealed that lays bare Mohamed Salah's Carabao Cup final struggles
arts.sum: Extent of Reds superstar’s lack of impact against Newcastle at Wembley saw him set an unlikely first in his Anfield career

arts.ttl: 'Be still my fluttering heart' - Gibbo's emotional words as Newcastle United win at Wembley - John Gibson - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: I had waited 56 years for us to win anything since the European Fairs Cup of 69, so long ago that I am the only journo still working on the NUFC beat who reported on that epic June night in Budapest. I had waited 70 years to see United lift a domestic trophy into the night air of north west London since as a small boy sitting in front of my auntie Grace’s postage stamp black and white telly I smugly watched Wor Jackie win us our third FA Cup in 1955.

arts.ttl: 'Immortality' - Newcastle United stars etch names into club history and lift Carabao Cup - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: After some horrendous experiences at Wembley over the years, Newcastle managed a shot at goal on three minutes. For at 18.30pm the last blast of John Brooks' whistle signalled history had been made and Newcastle United's agony is over!
